LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT ALBERT KUN'S DEMURRER TO THE FIRST, SECOND, THIRD AND FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGATIONS ARE CLEAR THAT KUN AS EITHER AN OFFICER OR ATTORNEY OF THE OWNER WAS NOT A PRINCIPAL OR PARTY BOUND BY THE CONTRACT OF SALE. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 2 AND 3 TO PLEAD WHAT KUN IN AN ACTIONABLE CAPACITY DID TO INTERFERE AND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 5 TO ELIMINATE ALLEGATIONS OF CONSPIRACY WITH A CLIENT AND TO PLEAD WHAT KUN DID TO JOIN OR FURTHER A CONSPIRACY TO DEFRAUD PLAINTIFF. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: MELANIE DAWN GHENO, CSR# 7489

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ALBERT KUN AMENDED DEMURRER AND MOTION TO DISMISS THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT AND MOTION TO STRIKE THE PRAYER FOR PUNITUVE DAMSGES IN THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 2 AND 3 BECAUSE KUN ACTED AS AN AGENT OR ATTORNEY FOR A CONTRACTING PARTY. SUSTAINED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 5 BECAUSE THE ALLEGATIONS NECESSARILY INCLUDE A CONSPIRACY WITH KUN'S CLIENT WITHOUT WHOM THE PROPERTY COULD NOT BE CONVEYED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. SUSTAINED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 2, 3 AND 5 AS TO ORLY FOR FAILURE TO APPLY FOR PERMISSION PURSUANT TO SECTION 1714.10. SUSTAINED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 5 AS TO MAGYARY AND FOVENYESSY WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FACTS SHOWING THEY JOINED A CONSPIRACY TO MAKE THE MISREPRESENTATIONS ALLEGED IN CAUSE OF ACTION 4, THE DEMURRER TO WHICH IS OVERRULED. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-05-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT ALBERT KUN'S DEMURRER TO THE FIRST, SECOND, THIRD AND FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION IN THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGATIONS ARE CLEAR THAT KUN AS EITHER AN OFFICER OR ATTORNEY OF THE OWNER WAS NOT A PRINCIPAL OR PARTY BOUND BY THE CONTRACT OF SALE. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 2 AND 3 TO PLEAD WHAT KUN IN AN ACTIONABLE CAPACITY DID TO INTERFERE AND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 5 TO ELIMINATE ALLEGATIONS OF CONSPIRACY WITH A CLIENT AND TO PLEAD WHAT KUN DID TO JOIN OR FURTHER A CONSPIRACY TO DEFRAUD PLAINTIFF. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR# 7489 =301/PJB/X-AH
